{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=The second prize of art in the Q collection. Art is in the occult! The designer was inspired by his experiences scaring children, and he left the company because he was receiving death threats every day.
|affct=ART
|hard=DEF
|source=Divine Order Chest (0.1%)
|color=orange
|earth=9
|water=9
|fire=11
|wind=13
|form=Demon
|element=Water
|realm=Kemet
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
